scenarios.title: dex market list — verify markets returned, BTC-USDC present
scenarios.description: Run `dex market list -o json` and verify: response is valid JSON, perpetuals array is non-empty, BTC-USDC market is present in the list.

scenarios.title: dex market mids — verify mid price for BTC-USDC is non-zero
scenarios.description: Run `dex market mids -o json` and verify: response is valid JSON, mid price for BTC-USDC is a positive non-zero number.

scenarios.title: dex market book --perpetual-id 0 — verify bid/ask levels present
scenarios.description: Run `dex market book --perpetual-id 0 -o json` and verify: response is valid JSON, bids array is non-empty, asks array is non-empty, bid price < ask price.

scenarios.title: dex market trades --perpetual-id 0 — verify recent trades returned
scenarios.description: Run `dex market trades --perpetual-id 0 -o json` and verify: response is valid JSON, trades array is non-empty, each trade has price, size, and timestamp fields.

scenarios.title: dex market candles --perpetual-id 0 --resolution 1m — verify candle data
scenarios.description: Run `dex market candles --perpetual-id 0 --resolution 1m -o json` and verify: response is valid JSON, candles array is non-empty, each candle has open/high/low/close/volume fields.

scenarios.title: dex account info — verify account balance/margin data returned
scenarios.description: Run `dex account info -o json` with wallet configured and verify: response is valid JSON, account balance and margin fields are present and numeric.

scenarios.title: dex order list — verify open orders list returns without error
scenarios.description: Run `dex order list -o json` and verify: command exits without error (non-crash), response is valid JSON (may be empty array if no open orders).

scenarios.title: dex position list — verify positions returned without error
scenarios.description: Run `dex position list -o json` and verify: command exits without error (non-crash), response is valid JSON (may be empty array if no open positions).

scenarios.title: dex status — verify node connectivity and sync status
scenarios.description: Run `dex status -o json` and verify: response is valid JSON, node is connected, sync status is healthy (not lagging).

scenarios.title: /dex-api/info POST {"type":"metaAndAssetCtxs"} — verify HTTP 200, data non-empty
scenarios.description: POST to https://dex-api.hifo.one/info with body {"type":"metaAndAssetCtxs"} and verify: HTTP 200, response body is valid JSON, data arrays are non-empty.

scenarios.title: /dex-api/info POST {"type":"webData2"} — verify HTTP 200
scenarios.description: POST to https://dex-api.hifo.one/info with body {"type":"webData2"} and verify: HTTP 200, response body is valid JSON, response is not empty.

scenarios.title: dex market list -o json — verify JSON parseable, perpetuals array non-empty
scenarios.description: Run `dex market list -o json`, pipe through python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert len(d["perpetuals"]) > 0' and verify: exits zero, JSON parses successfully.

scenarios.title: /dex-api/info POST clearinghouseState with wallet address — verify response
scenarios.description: POST to https://dex-api.hifo.one/info with body {"type":"clearinghouseState","user":"<wallet_address>"} and verify: HTTP 200, response is valid JSON, crossMarginSummary field present.

scenarios.title: WebSocket connection to dex-api — verify initial snapshot received
scenarios.description: Connect WebSocket to wss://dex-api.hifo.one/ws, subscribe to l2Book for perpetual-id 0, and verify: connection established, initial snapshot message received within 5s, message has bids and asks fields.

scenarios.title: dex order place limit (dry-run check) — verify validation works
scenarios.description: Run `dex order place --perpetual-id 0 --side buy --price 1 --size 0.001 --dry-run -o json` and verify: command does not crash (exit code 0 or known validation error), if no balance returns clear error message not a panic/stack trace.
